title: Prevent Overlapping Flight Assignments
description: The system shall reject a flight assignment if it would result in two flights occupying the same slot or runway at the same time.
rationale: To ensure safe operations by preventing aircraft from occupying the same space simultaneously, which could lead to collisions.
business_value: Improves safety and reduces the risk of accidents, ensuring that air traffic can operate efficiently without interference.

source.description: As a air traffic controller I need the system to detect and prevent overlapping assignments where two flights would occupy the same slot or runway simultaneously So that safe operations are ensured

acceptance_criteria: A flight assignment is being created or modified.
The assignment would result in two flights occupying the same slot or runway at the same time.
preconditions: The system monitors all flight assignments for slot and runway usage.
postconditions: The system should reject the assignment.
The air traffic controller of the conflict should be notified.
functional_constraints: Overlaps are defined as two or more flights assigned to the same resource at the same time.
edge_cases: What happens when a new flight assignment is created and it overlaps with an existing assignment that was not yet finalized?
How should the system handle overlapping assignments when one of the flights is in a different airspace sector?

interfaces.name: Flight Assignment API
interfaces.description: The system will use this API to receive flight assignments and check for overlaps.

interfaces.name: Flight Assignment Database
interfaces.description: The system will interact with this database to store and retrieve existing flight assignments.

test_cases.description: Create a new flight assignment that overlaps with an existing one.
test_cases.expected_result: The system should reject the new assignment and notify the controller of the conflict.

test_cases.description: Modify an existing flight assignment to create an overlap with another assignment.
test_cases.expected_result: The system should reject the modification and notify the controller of the conflict.
